display_text: Huskar Aghanim's Scepter: Life Break forces the enemy target to attack Huskar and increases cast range. This upgrade counters kiting and evasion mechanics, ensuring Huskar can reliably initiate and force engagements against mobile or ranged enemies while maintaining his berserker playstyle.
search_text: Huskar Aghanim Scepter anti-kite forced attack initiation berserker range increase

display_text: Huskar Aghanim's Shard: Inner Fire lowers cooldown, applies a movement speed slow, and heals Huskar based on damage dealt. This upgrade counters high-damage burst and kiting, transforming Huskar into a sustained frontline brawler who thrives in prolonged fights while disrupting enemy positioning.
search_text: Huskar Aghanim Shard sustain slow anti-burst frontline brawler healing
